title: No Netherite Armour
description: removes Netherite armour (not the tools, only the armour)
body: This datapack removes all Netherite armor crafting and upgrading recipes from the game. Players can no longer obtain Netherite helmets, chestplates, leggings, or boots through the Smithing Table or any other method. Netherite tools and weapons are unaffected and remain fully craftable and usable. This change adjusts progression balance by restricting overpowered armor while preserving late-game tool functionality.
